name: Burning Rosemary incense
description: Fragrant incense sticks infused with the cleansing, herbaceous scent of burning rosemary — perfect for setting a witchy autumnal atmosphere at home.
archive_note: A seasonal Kitchen exclusive incense product, part of Lush's Halloween and autumnal home fragrance offerings.
nostalgia_angle: A rare non-cosmetic Kitchen offering, beloved by fans who appreciate Lush's forays into home fragrance.
throwback_reference: Echoes the ancient tradition of burning rosemary for purification and protection, a perfect fit for Lush's autumnal witchy aesthetic.
